entries.openingLines: It was a dark and stormy night; the rain fell in torrents — except at occasional intervals, when it was checked by a violent gust of wind which swept up the streets.
entries.title: Paul Clifford
entries.author: Edward Bulwer-Lytton

entries.openingLines: The thousand injuries of Fortunato I had borne as I best could, but when he ventured upon insult I vowed revenge.
entries.title: The Cask of Amontillado
entries.author: Edgar Allan Poe

entries.openingLines: The morning of June 27th was clear and sunny, with the fresh warmth of a full-summer day.
entries.title: The Lottery
entries.author: Shirley Jackson
